subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who desireth to drink of the Kawthar of life in this Day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یشرب کوثر الحیوان فی هذا الیوم الذی فیه اخذت
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
